creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
The attached not was sent to Mark Hessling, THE editor author. It
appears that THE-3B3 includes a change that breaks with REXX-1.76. I
have not received any response yet. Prior versions of THE do not exhibit
this problem.

The testing that I have done shows that PDCurses-3.3/-3.4 both break the
cursor handling in THE-3.1/-3.2, making the X11 version of THE
practically useless.

At this point, without doing an exhaustive debugging of THE and
PDCurses, I would say that the problem with THE & PDCurses belongs in
the PDCurses camp. I would also say that THE-3.B3 is not ready for
release. Therefore - THE should be frozen at v3.2 until further notice.
